# The DARK Psychology That Makes Clients CHASE YOU (Even If They've Never Heard of You)
**Channel:** Adam Erhart
**URL:** https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LaSKLHPBroI
**Date:** 2026-04-01
**Content source:** auto-generated transcript

## Summary
This video explains how the "mere exposure effect" (psychological principle that familiarity builds trust) applies to B2B sales and positioning. Rather than constantly pivoting your niche, offer, or message, the video teaches a "stacking method" that uses consistent positioning to become the obvious choice to prospects—even those who've never heard of you.

## Key Points & Strategies

- **Lock Your Piece (Move 1):** Pick one specific market, one specific problem, and one specific offer. Commit to it long enough for people to remember you. Don't fear wrong positioning—the market rewards *consistent* positioning over perfect positioning.

- **The Mere Exposure Effect:** Dr. Robert Zajonc's research shows familiarity increases positive feelings by up to 60%. Every pivot resets your familiarity clock and makes you a stranger again.

- **Repeat the Row (Move 2):** Say the same message across all channels—website, social media, email, sales conversations. Consistency builds trust; inconsistency creates gaps in your positioning.

- **Stop Rotating Pieces:** Constantly changing niches, offers, or messaging prevents audience recognition. You need 18+ months of consistent positioning in one market before that niche becomes easy to serve.

- **Alignment Audit:** Audit your website, LinkedIn, Instagram bio, and email signature to ensure they all communicate the same value proposition and target market.

- **Pick Based on Past Wins:** Don't overthink market selection. Choose the people you've already helped get results—that's your market.

## Workflows & Tools Discussed

- Website messaging alignment
- LinkedIn headline optimization
- Instagram bio consistency
- Email signature standardization
- Multi-channel message audit (social media, website, email)

## Use Cases Covered

- **James's Marketing Agency:** Changed niches 4 times in 6 months, rebuilt website 3 times, tested 6 lead gen strategies simultaneously. After applying the stacking method and committing to one positioning, he grew from 2 to 11 clients ($4K to $22K monthly revenue) in 4 months.

- **Business Coach:** Had three different messages across Instagram (mindset coach), website (business strategy), and LinkedIn (startup consultant). After aligning all channels to one message, conversion improved.

## Quotes Worth Noting

> "Being recognized beats being brilliant."

> "The hardest niche to serve is the one that you just started. The easiest niche to serve is the one you've been serving for 18 months."

> "Repetition isn't annoying. Inconsistency is."
